prefer-writable-derived.description: Prefer using writable $derived instead of $state and $effect

require-event-prefix.description: require component event names to start with "on"

require-optimized-style-attribute.description: require style attributes that can be optimized

require-store-reactive-access.description: disallow to use of the store itself as an operand. Need to use $ prefix or get function.

shorthand-attribute.description: enforce use of shorthand syntax in attribute

shorthand-directive.description: enforce use of shorthand syntax in directives

spaced-html-comment.description: enforce consistent spacing after the `<!--` and before the `-->` in a HTML comment

system.description: system rule for working this plugin

valid-each-key.description: enforce keys to use variables defined in the `{#each}` block

valid-prop-names-in-kit-pages.description: disallow props other than data or errors in SvelteKit page components.

eslint-plugin-eslint-comments.name: eslint-plugin-eslint-comments
eslint-plugin-eslint-comments.description: Additional ESLint rules for directive comments of ESLint.

disable-enable-pair.description: require a `eslint-enable` comment for every `eslint-disable` comment

no-aggregating-enable.description: disallow a `eslint-enable` comment for multiple `eslint-disable` comments

require-description.description: require include descriptions in ESLint directive-comments

consistent-spacing-between-blocks.description: Enforces a blank line between Playwright test blocks (e.g., test, test.step, test.beforeEach, etc.).

expect-expect.description: Enforce assertion to be made in a test body

max-expects.description: Enforces a maximum number assertion calls in a test body

max-nested-describe.description: Enforces a maximum depth to nested describe calls

missing-playwright-await.description: Identify false positives when async Playwright APIs are not properly awaited.

no-duplicate-hooks.description: Disallow duplicate setup and teardown hooks

no-duplicate-slow.description: Disallow multiple `test.slow()` calls in the same test

no-element-handle.description: The use of ElementHandle is discouraged, use Locator instead

no-eval.description: The use of `page.$eval` and `page.$$eval` are discouraged, use `locator.evaluate` or `locator.evaluateAll` instead

no-focused-test.description: Prevent usage of `.only()` focus test annotation

no-force-option.description: Prevent usage of `{ force: true }` option.

no-networkidle.description: Prevent usage of the networkidle option

no-raw-locators.description: Disallows the usage of raw locators

no-restricted-locators.description: Disallows the usage of specific locator methods

no-restricted-roles.description: Disallows the usage of specific roles in getByRole()

no-skipped-test.description: Prevent usage of the `.skip()` skip test annotation.

no-slowed-test.description: Prevent usage of the `.slow()` slow test annotation.

no-unsafe-references.description: Prevent unsafe variable references in page.evaluate() and page.addInitScript()

no-unused-locators.description: Disallow usage of page locators that are not used

no-useless-await.description: Disallow unnecessary awaits for Playwright methods

no-useless-not.description: Disallow usage of 'not' matchers when a more specific matcher exists

prefer-comparison-matcher.description: Suggest using the built-in comparison matchers

prefer-equality-matcher.description: Suggest using the built-in equality matchers

prefer-hooks-in-order.description: Prefer having hooks in a consistent order

prefer-hooks-on-top.description: Suggest having hooks before any test cases

require-hook.description: Require setup and teardown code to be within a hook

require-tags.description: Require test blocks to have tags

require-top-level-describe.description: Require test cases and hooks to be inside a `test.describe` block

valid-expect-in-promise.description: Require promises that have expectations in their chain to be valid

valid-test-tags.description: Enforce valid tag format in Playwright test blocks and titles

eslint-plugin-command.name: eslint-plugin-command
eslint-plugin-command.description: Comment-as-command for one-off codemod with ESLint.

command.description: Comment-as-command for one-off codemod with ESLint

eslint-plugin-unused-imports.name: eslint-plugin-unused-imports
eslint-plugin-unused-imports.description: Package to separate no-unused-vars and no-unused-imports for eslint as well as providing an autofixer for the latter.
